name: galacto
description: A GPU-accelerated self-gravitating N-body galaxy sandbox in Rust, WebAssembly, and WebGPU

scripts.setup: npm ci && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && cargo install wasm-pack --locked --version 0.15.0 --force && cargo install cargo-audit --locked --version 0.22.2 --force
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run assemble && npm run verify:build
scripts.assemble: node scripts/assemble-dist.mjs dist && node scripts/cache-bust.mjs dist
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.audit: npm run audit:npm && npm run audit:rust
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=galacto

author: Multivibrator
